name: MyAAC Web Panel
author: alexveley
description: MyAAC web panel for Open Tibia. Use the same database as your TFS game server: copy the connection details from your TFS server's Databases tab into this server's Startup Variables. Do not create a database for this server.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== MyAAC WEB SERVER INSTALLER ==="

SERVER_DIR="/mnt/server"
cd "$SERVER_DIR"

if ! command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  apt-get update
  apt-get install -y git curl ca-certificates
fi

if [ ! -d myaac ]; then
  echo "Cloning MyAAC..."
  git clone https://github.com/slawkens/myaac.git myaac
fi

cd myaac

if [ ! -f composer.phar ]; then
  echo "Downloading Composer..."
  curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php
fi

if [ ! -d vendor ]; then
  echo "Installing PHP dependencies..."
  php composer.phar install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader
fi

mkdir -p system/cache images
chmod -R 775 system/cache images

if [ -n "${MYSQL_HOST:-}" ] && [ ! -f config.local.php ]; then
  echo "Writing config.local.php from environment..."
  cat > config.local.php <<EOPHP
<?php
\$config['database_host'] = getenv('MYSQL_HOST') ?: 'localhost';
\$config['database_port'] = getenv('MYSQL_PORT') ?: '3306';
\$config['database_user'] = getenv('MYSQL_USER') ?: 'root';
\$config['database_password'] = getenv('MYSQL_PASSWORD') ?: '';
\$config['database_name'] = getenv('MYSQL_DATABASE') ?: 'forgottenserver';
EOPHP
fi

echo "=== MyAAC INSTALLER END ==="

variables.name: Web Port
variables.description: Port for HTTP (e.g. 8080). Assign this allocation to the server.

variables.name: MySQL Host
variables.description: Same as your TFS server. Copy from TFS server's Databases tab.

variables.name: MySQL User
variables.description: Same as your TFS server. Copy from TFS server's Databases tab.

variables.name: MySQL Password
variables.description: Same as your TFS server. Copy from TFS server's Databases tab.

variables.name: MySQL Database
variables.description: Same as your TFS server. Copy from TFS server's Databases tab.
